command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/setup_mcp_serve.sh << 'SHEOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Stop failed acp service
systemctl --user stop hermes-acp
systemctl --user disable hermes-acp

# Check hermes mcp serve options
/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/hermes mcp serve --help 2>&1

SHEOF
bash /tmp/setup_mcp_serve.sh"
